nasb.text: In the third year of the reign of Belshazzar the king a vision appeared to me, Daniel, subsequent to the one which appeared to me previously.

esv.text: In the third year of the reign of King Belshazzar a vision appeared to me, Daniel, after that which appeared to me at the first.

cnv.text: 伯沙撒王在位第三年，在先前顯給我的異象之後，再有一個異象向我但以理顯現。

ccb.text: 在看见先前的异象之后，我但以理在伯沙撒王执政第三年又看见一个异象。
